pi_items.source: Code inspection: export_result.sh:11 and setup_task.sh:10 both reference this path as the target output file
Code inspection: setup_task.sh:166 creates the file at this exact path with doc.save()
Code inspection: setup_task.sh:15-49 creates this file with cat heredoc and explicitly names it acs_style_guide.txt

pi_items.metadata_value: Microplastic Accumulation in Great Lakes Tributaries
pi_items.verified_value: Microplastic Accumulation in Great Lakes Tributaries
pi_items.source: Code inspection: setup_task.sh:32-33 explicitly contains this text in the style guide, describing it as the running header text

Code inspection: setup_task.sh:109-134 defines sections list with 7 main sections marked as FakeH1 style: Abstract, Introduction, Materials and Methods, Results and Discussion, Conclusions, Acknowledgments, References

Code inspection: setup_task.sh lines 118-125 show 6 subsections marked as FakeH2 style: Study Sites and Sampling Design, Sample Processing and Analysis, Quality Assurance and Quality Control, Spatial Distribution Patterns, Polymer Composition Analysis, Environmental Implications

Code inspection: setup_task.sh:151-164 shows that the manuscript contains 25 reference entries total (6 hardcoded real references on lines 151-157, plus 19 dummy references generated by loop on lines 160-161 with 'for i in range(7, 26)'). Additionally, task.json description (line 8 of description) explicitly states 'Format the 25 reference entries with a hanging indent'

privileged_info_summary: The task involves reformatting a synthetic research manuscript about microplastic accumulation in Great Lakes tributaries. The manuscript is generated programmatically with 7 main section headings (Abstract, Introduction, Materials and Methods, Results and Discussion, Conclusions, Acknowledgments, References) and 6 subsection headings. The document contains 25 reference entries that require hanging indent formatting according to ACS journal guidelines. Key formatting requirements include 1-inch margins on all sides, Times New Roman 12pt font, double-spaced text, continuous line numbering, running header with the manuscript title, and centered page numbers in footer. The metadata claim of 15 required hanging indents contradicts the actual task specification which explicitly requires formatting all 25 reference entries with hanging indents.
